briefdescription.para: Retrieve information about the last error as a string.

detaileddescription.para: Returns NULL if no error occurred since last call to set_last_error(server, NULL).
This function allows a command sequence object to be reused for a difference sequence.

briefdescription.para: This function performs get command operation.

simplesect.para: returns return value of type js_lib_command_t

briefdescription.para: Adds command to move JTAG state machine to <state> and cycle TCK <clock> times.

detaileddescription.para: The <clock> argument is only applicable for when <state> is one of the stable states JS_RESET, JS_IDLE, JS_PAUSE_IR or JS_PAUSE_DR.

briefdescription.para: This function performs get buffer operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (js_command_sequence_t *cmdseq, unsigned int flags, size_t bits, unsigned char **tdi_buffer, unsigned char **tdo_buffer, js_state_t state)
memberdef.name: js_add_shift

briefdescription.para: Auto detect TAPs on scan chain.

detaileddescription.para: This typically involes a reset of the scan chain followed by reading data registers.
The result is allocated using malloc() and the caller is responsible for freeing the buffer when it is no longer needed.

briefdescription.para: Get list of available JTAG ports supported by this server.
Open a specific JTAG port for this server instance.
Open a specific JTAG port for this server instance.
This function performs normalize command sequence operation.
